hero.subtitle: ॐ   Jai Shree Shyam   ॐ
hero.title: Khatu Shyam Ji Temple
hero.desc: Haare Ka Sahara, Baba Shyam Hamara — Experience the divine blessings of Shri Shyam Baba. Book pujas, darshan passes and donate from anywhere.

about.subtitle: About the Temple
about.title: Shri Khatu Shyam Ji Mandir
about.p1: Located in Khatu village of Sikar district, Rajasthan, the Khatu Shyam Ji temple is one of the most revered shrines in India. Devotees believe that Baba Shyam — also known as "Haare Ka Sahara" — fulfills the wishes of all who visit with a pure heart.
about.p2: The temple draws millions of pilgrims every year, especially during the Phalgun Mela and Shyam Ekadashi. The deity is especially worshipped by traders and businessmen seeking blessings for prosperity.

services.title: Online Services
services.bhandaraDesc: Apply for official permission to organise Bhandara (community feast) within the temple premises. Submit details of your event, expected guests and preferred dates for approval.
services.medicalDesc: Register to organise or participate in medical camps during Mela season. Free health check-ups, blood donation drives and emergency medical aid for devotees.
services.accomodationDesc: Book dharamshala rooms, guest houses and other accommodation near the temple. Affordable stays with verified listings for families, groups and senior devotees.
services.vehicleDesc: Apply for official vehicle permits to enter restricted Mela zones. Permits are issued for cars, buses and emergency vehicles with verified credentials.
services.darshanDesc: Reserve your Sheegh Darshan and aarti passes online for hassle-free entry. Choose a preferred time-slot and receive your QR-coded pass instantly.
services.officerDesc: Secure portal for temple administration, police and emergency officers to manage permits, crowd movement, control-room duties and live alerts.
services.trafficDesc: Real-time traffic, parking and crowd-density dashboard for Mela operations. Used by officers to monitor and divert flow across temple sectors.
services.donationDesc: Offer your humble contribution to Khatu Shyam Ji Temple. Receipts with 80G tax-exemption issued instantly. Every donation supports temple seva.
services.lostDesc: Report lost items or missing persons during the Mela and search the live registry of recovered belongings. Coordinated with the Mela control room.
services.yatraDesc: Plan your complete Khatu Shyam Ji yatra with route maps, travel guides, nearby attractions and suggested itineraries. Get tips on best times to visit, local transport and must-see spots.
services.crowdDesc: Check real-time crowd density, queue lengths, and estimated darshan wait times to plan your visit. Live feeds directly from the temple's control center.

cta.subtitle: Join Our Community
cta.title: Register as a Devotee Today
cta.desc: Create your account to book pujas, get aarti notifications and access exclusive darshan passes.
